channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Rockets' Amen Thompson throws Heat star Tyler Herro to the floor, sparking skirmish
item.description: Miami Heat star Tyler Herro and Houston Rockets forward Amen Thompson got into a skirmish toward the end of their matchup on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jayden Daniels dazzles again as Commanders clinch a playoff spot by beating Falcons 30-24 in OT
item.description: Jayden Daniels connected with Zach Ertz in overtime for his third touchdown pass of the game to clinch a playoff spot by beating the Atlanta Falcons 30-24 in overtime Sunday night in a back-and-forth prime-time showdown between highly drafted rookie quarterbacks.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bills clinch the AFC's No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the undisciplined Jets
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen reflected on Buffalo’s many offseason critics and doubters when asked about the Bills achieving their latest milestones while sewing up the AFC’s No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the unraveling and undisciplined New York Jets on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NFC's No. 1 seed comes down to Vikings-Lions showdown at Detroit in Week 18
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed will come down to the final game of the regular season when the Detroit Lions host the Minnesota Vikings next Sunday night. The winner takes the NFC North and gets a first-round playoff bye and home-field advantage until the Super Bowl. The loser becomes the No.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Chip Kelly returns to the Rose Bowl, this time as Ohio State's offensive coordinator
item.description: The Rose Bowl between eighth-seeded Ohio State and top-seeded Oregon in a College Football Playoff quarterfinal has many subplots for Chip Kelly.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Thompson-Herro fight leads to ejections of multiple players and coaches in Heat's victory in Houston
item.description: Rockets forward Amen Thompson threw Heat guard Tyler Herro to the floor to trigger an altercation that resulted in six ejections in the closing minute of Miami's 104-100 victory over Houston on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Herro leads Heat over Rockets in game marred by fight and ejections in final minute
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Tyler Herro scored 27 points before being one of seven people ejected, six for their roles in a fight in the final minute of the Miami Heat's 104-100 victory over the Houston Rockets on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Hanna Cavinder praises boyfriend Carson Beck as Georgia star declares for NFL Draft
item.description: Hanna Cavinder, the Miami Hurricanes guard and social media sensation, congratulated her boyfriend, Georgia quarterback Carson Beck, on declaring for the 2025 NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Feels like 1979: Nottingham Forest moves into 2nd place behind rampant Liverpool in Premier League
item.description: The Premier League table is starting to have a 1979 kind of feel to it — with Liverpool at the top of the standings and Nottingham Forest in second place as the closest challenger.
item.dc:creator: MATTIAS KAREN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL fans mock Eagles' Kenny Pickett over bizarre play that led to fumble
item.description: NFL fans came after Philadelphia Eagles quarterback Kenny Pickett over a head-scratching play against the Dallas Cowboys on Sunday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-Trudeau adviser casts doubt on Canadian PM's future after Trump floats Wayne Gretzky idea
item.description: A former adviser to Canadian Prime Minister Trudeau had a grim outlook on the world leader's political future after President-elect Trump floated an idea for a replacement.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Miami's Cam Ward opts out of bowl game in 2nd half after setting TD record, ignites social media debate
item.description: Miami Hurricanes quarterback Cam Ward opted out of the team's bowl game in the second half after breaking the collegiate touchdown passes record.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LeBron James at 40: A milestone birthday arrives Monday for the NBA's all-time scoring leader
item.description: When LeBron James broke another NBA record earlier this month, the one for most regular-season minutes played in a career, his Los Angeles Lakers teammates handled the moment in typical locker room fashion. They made fun of him. “They told me I’m old as hell,” James quipped.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USU beats San Diego State on last-second shot, 67-66
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men’s basketball earned its first road win over a ranked opponent in over three decades Saturday afternoon in front of a sellout crowd at Viejas Arena, taking down No. 20 San Diego State 67-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Doug Christie hopes to bring stability to Kings after firing of Mike Brown
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Based on what he saw in a 132-122 loss to the Los Angeles Lakers on Saturday night after what he described as a “crazy 24 hours” following the firing of Mike Brown, interim coach Doug Christie thinks the Sacramento Kings are capable of turning things around.
item.dc:creator: DAN GREENSPAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dallas' Naji Marshall gets 4-game suspension, Phoenix's Jusuf Nurkic is banned 3 games for fight
item.description: The NBA suspended Dallas Mavericks forward Naji Marshall for four games and Phoenix Suns center Jusuf Nurkic for three games for their roles in an on-court fight during Friday night's game. Dallas forward P.J. Washington was suspended one game. The suspensions handed down Saturday are without pay.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giddey's triple-double sends Bulls to 116-111 win over Bucks
item.description: Josh Giddey had 23 points, 15 rebounds and 10 assists for his second triple-double this season to lead the Chicago Bulls to a 116-111 win over the Milwaukee Bucks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Burrow throws 3-yard TD pass to Higgins in OT as the Bengals beat the Broncos 30-24
item.description: CINCINNATI (AP) — This time, near the very end of a mostly agonizing season, the Cincinnati Bengals made enough plays to win. A familiar connection closed it out.
item.dc:creator: MITCH STACY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Southern California overcomes 17-point deficit to beat Texas A&M 35-31 in Las Vegas Bowl
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Southern California Trojans ended their season the way they started it. On Sept. 1 at Allegiant Stadium in the opener, the Trojans overcame a third-quarter deficit and scored with eight seconds left to beat LSU 27-20.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Syracuse defeats Washington State in DIRECTV Holiday Bowl
item.description: Syracuse quarterback Kyle McCord put on a stellar performance Friday to help his team win the DIRECTV Holiday Bowl at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: (AP) -- Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization's planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A's for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Ahead of 2025, WWE Champion Cody Rhodes talks balancing fatherhood and wrestling's biggest stage
item.description: Heading into 2025, Cody Rhodes reflects on his epic year and sets new goals for fatherhood and WrestleMania 41 in Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, Fox 5

item.title: Holiday Bowl football players visit SeaWorld San Diego
item.description: Football players from the two teams facing off in the DIRECTV Holiday Bowl spent a few hours Wednesday morning celebrating Christmas at SeaWorld San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Beyoncé's performance highlighted Netflix's NFL debut on Christmas Day
item.description: Beyoncé provided more excitement than either game during Netflix’s NFL debut on Christmas Day. Riding into her halftime appearance on a white horse, the 32-time Grammy winner rocked her hometown Houston crowd with a nearly 13-minute performance on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Reports: Pete Carroll interested in Bears' head-coaching job
item.description: Former Seattle Seahawks head coach Pete Carroll has expressed interest in becoming the next head coach of the Chicago Bears, who are looking to fill their head coaching vacancy for the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Breaking: Dave Fleming leaves CMU after 20 years
item.description: "I thank Coach Fleming for all his dedication and hard work at CMU," Colorado Mesa Athletic Director Joan McDermott said in a press release. "He is not only a great coach, but a special person and will be greatly missed.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Kiser, KREX 5

item.title: Caitlin Clark honored as AP Female Athlete of the Year following her impact on women's sports
item.description: Caitlin Clark raised the profile of women's basketball to unprecedented levels in both the college ranks and the WNBA, and Tuesday she was named the AP Female Athlete of the Year for her impact on and off the court.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC drops second straight home game, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - While the Utah Hockey Club has won seven in a row on the game, the team continues to struggle at home. Roope Hintz scored his team-leading 15th goal of the season, and the Dallas Stars held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Houston Astros welcome 1B Christian Walker to team; say negotiations with Bregman stalled
item.description: The Astros welcomed first baseman Christian Walker to the team Monday, in one of two moves that almost certainly marks the end of Alex Bregman’s time in Houston.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs with Bowles: Mistakes cost Bucs a game and their division lead
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers four-game winning streak came to an end Sunday night with a 26-24 loss to the Dallas Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Houston Texans wide receiver Tank Dell released from hospital after severe knee injury
item.description: It’s the second straight year Tank Dell has sustained what is almost certain to be a season-ending injury.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation
